name: Animal Kingdoms RP
description:
Welcome to Animal Kingdom RP. A world you can become any animal as you want to even a insect. Live your animal life as a deer, monkey, frog, wolf and etc. Join an pack, form a alliance among the animals, and explore the the wildness.
